questions.prompt: a, b, c are sides of a triangle with perimeter 18 and a = 4.
questions.explanation: Perimeter = a + b + c = 18. So b + c = 18 - 4 = 14. Equal.

questions.prompt: x and y are non-zero real numbers with xy < 0.
questions.explanation: A - B = (x²+y²) - (x²-y²) = 2y² > 0 since y ≠ 0. So A > B always.

questions.prompt: A fair six-sided die is rolled twice.
The function f(x) = x³ - 12x has a local maximum at x = -2.

questions.explanation: |n-5| < 3 means 2 < n < 8, so n ∈ {3,4,5,6,7}. In all cases n < 8. So B > A.

questions.prompt: The sum of n consecutive integers starting from 1 is S.
In a right triangle, the two legs have lengths 9 and 40.
A 30-60-90 triangle has its shortest side equal to 6. What is its area?
A store marks up a cost price by 40%, then offers a 20% discount. The final price is what percentage of the original cost?
questions.explanation: Cost = C. After markup: 1.4C. After 20% discount: 1.4C × 0.8 = 1.12C = 112% of cost.

questions.prompt: In how many ways can 4 people be selected from a group of 9 to form a committee, if 2 specific people (A and B) cannot both be on the committee?
questions.explanation: Total C(9,4)=126. Subtract cases where both A and B are selected: C(7,2)=21. Answer: 126-21=105.

questions.prompt: What is the remainder when 7^100 is divided by 8?
The arithmetic mean of 5 numbers is 14. When one number is removed, the mean of the remaining 4 is 13. What is the removed number?
questions.explanation: Sum of 5 = 70. Sum of remaining 4 = 52. Removed = 70-52 = 18.

questions.prompt: Line ℓ passes through (1, 2) and is perpendicular to the line y = (3/4)x + 1. At what x-value does ℓ intersect the x-axis?
questions.explanation: Slope of perpendicular = -4/3. Through (1,2): y-2 = -4/3(x-1). Set y=0: -2 = -4/3(x-1), so x-1 = 3/2, x = 5/2.

questions.prompt: Which of the following numbers are prime? Indicate all that apply.
questions.explanation: 91 = 7×13 (not prime). 97: no factors up to √97≈9.8: not divisible by 2,3,5,7 → prime. 101: not divisible by 2,3,5,7 → prime. 111 = 3×37 (not prime). 127: not divisible by 2,3,5,7,11 → prime. Correct: 97, 101, 127.
